titleStmt.title: SII 38.231: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 231. (A.R. No. 231 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the south base of the Gauḷiśvara temple, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: End built in. This inscription begins with the meykīrtti of the king, Tirumagaḷ jayamagaḷ.

Records the gift for burning a perpetual lamp to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr by Kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ Siṅgaḷāntakan Gaṅgaikoṇḍāṉ of Ānāṅkūr in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻavaḷanāḍu. A maṉṟāḍi (shepherd) of Tribhuvanasundara-chēri (a locality) at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr, was probably entrusted with sheep for the purpose of measuring out ninety nāḻi of ghee towards burning the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumakaḷ jayamakaḷ tiruppuyattiruppa Oru nilattoru kuṭai niṟpa poruvalip pāṇṭiyaṉ curamatu Iṟaṅka Ampuvi meruviṟ puli viḷaiyāṭap pārmicai māṟṟaraice ceṉumoḻi māṟṟa nāṟṟicai maṉṉar tiṟai muṟai Aḷappa maṉniya vira⎯⎯
niraṇṭāvatu rājentracoḻavaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu Ānāṅkūrk kuṉṟaṅkiḻāṉ ciṅkaḷān=takaṉ kaṅkaikoṇṭāṉ Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku can=tarātittavaṟ tirunan=tāviḷakku Oṉṟerivataṟku neyyaṭṭa tiruvoṟṟiyūrt tiripuvaṉacun=taracceri maṉṟāṭi pa
toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻi Itu panmāyeśvararakṣai Aṟamaṟavaṟkkaṟamallatu tuṇaiyillai ..
Digital edition of SII 38.231 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
